name: Seven-up Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and shortening together until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating after each addition.
3. Add eggs one at a time, blending well after each egg is incorporated.
4. Stir in flour, then mix in lemon extract.
5. Pour 7-Up into the batter and blend thoroughly.
6. Transfer the mixture to a greased and floured tube pan.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 to 1 1/2 hours.
